iti9:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti9:2.1:
“Monks, one who has not fully known & fully understood greed, whose mind has not been cleansed of passion for it,
has not abandoned it, is incapable of putting an end to stress.
iti9:2.2:
But one who has fully known & fully understood greed,
who has detached his mind from it and let go of it, is capable of putting an end to stress.”
iti9:3.2: beings go to a bad destination, coveting:
iti9:3.4: those who see clearly let go.
iti9:3.6: they never come to this world again.
